problem id: 00066667
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  01010001 -> 11011101
  00001001 -> 01101101
  00010101 -> 01010101
  11111111 -> 10000001
  10011101 -> 01000101
  00111011 -> 00001001
  10111101 -> 00000101
  00100110 -> 10110011

query: 00110100
predicted answer: 10010111
